nasb.text: Then God opened her eyes and she saw a well of water; and she went and filled the skin with water and gave the lad a drink.

esv.text: Then God opened her eyes, and she saw a well of water. And she went and filled the skin with water and gave the boy a drink.

cnv.text: 神開了夏甲的眼睛，她就看見一口水井。她去把皮袋盛滿了水，就給孩子喝。

ccb.text: 上帝使夏甲的眼睛明亮，让她看见一口水井，她就上前把皮袋装满水拿给儿子喝。

csbs.text: 神打开了夏甲的眼睛，她就看见一口水井，于是走过去把皮袋倒满了水，给那少年喝。
